examples: The article related the regularity of residue degradation of often used herbicide-trifluralin in soils.
The result indicated that, alfalfa seedlings grew well, the weed control efficiency of trifluralin reached above 90%.
The invention discloses a herbicide prepared by binary compounding of oxyfluorfen and trifluralin and a preparation method thereof.
As Albaugh added products like the herbicide trifluralin to his lineup, he saw that his biggest sellers were made by Atanor.
